song.title: Begin the Day with God
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Begin the day with God! He is thy Sun and Day! His is the radiance of thy dawn; To Him address thy lay.
[v2] 2) Sing a new song at morn! Join the glad woods and hills; Join the fresh winds and seas and plains, Join the bright flowers and rills.
[V3] 3) Sing thy first song to God! Not to thy fellowman; Not to the creatures of His hand, But to the glorious One.
[V4] 4) Take thy first walk with God! Let Him go forth with thee; By stream, or sea, or mountain path, Seek still His company.
[V5] 5) Thy first transaction be With God Himself above! So shall thy business prosper well And all the day be love.
song.author: Horatious Bonar, Lowell Mason
